panels.title: Finance projection trust
panels.description: Authoritative trust gate evaluated at query time. TRUSTED means every expected source, reconciliation, quarantine, and review-queue gate currently passes.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT trusted AS value FROM finance_trust

panels.title: Trust gate reasons
panels.description: Machine-readable reasons from the finance trust view, evaluated now. An empty JSON array means no active trust failure.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE trusted WHEN 1 THEN 'No active failures' ELSE reasons END AS "Current trust status / reasons" FROM finance_trust

panels.title: Net worth — close
panels.description: EUR. Sum of all accounts from the latest immutable month-close capture; the capture timestamp is returned with the value.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_capture AS (SELECT MAX(captured_at) captured_at FROM net_worth_snapshots) SELECT SUM(n.balance_cents) / 100.0 AS value, MAX(n.captured_at) AS captured_at FROM net_worth_snapshots n JOIN latest_capture l ON l.captured_at=n.captured_at

panels.title: Liquid — close
panels.description: EUR. On-budget, open accounts from the same latest immutable month-close capture; current account metadata only identifies liquid accounts.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest_capture AS (SELECT MAX(captured_at) captured_at FROM net_worth_snapshots) SELECT SUM(n.balance_cents) / 100.0 AS value, MAX(n.captured_at) AS captured_at FROM net_worth_snapshots n JOIN latest_capture l ON l.captured_at=n.captured_at JOIN accounts a ON a.id=n.account_id WHERE a.offbudget=0 AND a.closed=0

panels.title: Safe — month
panels.description: EUR, current month, evaluated_at returned by the canonical calculation. Positive discretionary availability minus essential underfunding and unpaid discretionary schedules due through month-end; hidden when finance trust fails.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN s.month_cents/100.0 END AS value,s.evaluated_at FROM safe_to_spend s CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Safe — day
panels.description: EUR/day through month end, including today; evaluated_at is returned by the canonical schedule-aware calculation and the value is hidden when finance trust fails.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 THEN s.per_day_cents/100.0 END AS value,s.evaluated_at FROM safe_to_spend s CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Savings rate
panels.description: Percent, evaluated_at returned by the query. Current-month contributions divided by ordinary income; null when income is zero or finance trust fails.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN f.trusted=1 AND i.value_cents>0 THEN 100.0*s.value_cents/i.value_cents END AS value,datetime('now') AS evaluated_at FROM (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents),0) value_cents FROM ordinary_income WHERE month=strftime('%Y-%m','now')) i CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents),0) value_cents FROM savings_contributions WHERE month=strftime('%Y-%m','now')) s CROSS JOIN finance_trust f

panels.title: Open review queue
panels.description: Count now. On-budget, non-transfer transactions missing a category or normalized payee in the canonical review queue.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM review_queue

panels.title: Current envelope funding and consumption by role
panels.description: EUR, current budget month returned as data_as_of. Budgeted amount and absolute spend grouped by canonical role; exact values are available in tooltips.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT category_role AS role,SUM(budgeted_cents)/100.0 AS "Funded EUR",ABS(SUM(spent_cents))/100.0 AS "Consumed EUR",MAX(month) AS data_as_of FROM current_budgets WHERE month=strftime('%Y-%m','now') GROUP BY category_role ORDER BY category_role

panels.title: Expected source freshness
panels.description: Latest run per expected source, evaluated now. Age and expected cadence are hours; status text distinguishes current, stale, and missing without relying on color.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH attempts AS (SELECT a.*,p.finished_at,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.account_id,a.source ORDER BY p.finished_at DESC,a.run_id DESC) r FROM pipeline_run_accounts a JOIN pipeline_runs p ON p.run_id=a.run_id), successes AS (SELECT a.*,p.finished_at,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a.account_id,a.source ORDER BY a.requested_to DESC,p.finished_at DESC,a.run_id DESC) r FROM pipeline_run_accounts a JOIN pipeline_runs p ON p.run_id=a.run_id WHERE a.outcome='success') SELECT e.account_id AS Account,e.source AS Source,a.finished_at AS "Latest attempt UTC",a.outcome AS "Attempt outcome",s.requested_to AS "Covered through",ROUND(e.expected_cadence_seconds/3600.0,1) AS "Expected hours",CASE WHEN e.expected_cadence_seconds IS NULL OR e.expected_cadence_seconds<=0 THEN 'NO CADENCE' WHEN a.run_id IS NULL THEN 'MISSING ATTEMPT' WHEN a.outcome<>'success' THEN 'ATTEMPT FAILED/DRY/EMPTY' WHEN s.run_id IS NULL THEN 'NO SUCCESS' WHEN s.requested_from IS NULL OR s.requested_to IS NULL OR julianday(s.requested_from) IS NULL OR julianday(s.requested_to) IS NULL OR date(julianday(s.requested_from))<>s.requested_from OR date(julianday(s.requested_to))<>s.requested_to OR s.requested_from>s.requested_to OR s.requested_to>date('now') THEN 'INVALID COVERAGE' WHEN s.requested_to<date('now',printf('-%d seconds',e.expected_cadence_seconds)) THEN 'STALE COVERAGE' WHEN strftime('%s',s.finished_at) IS NULL OR strftime('%s','now')-strftime('%s',s.finished_at)>e.expected_cadence_seconds THEN 'STALE SUCCESS' ELSE 'CURRENT' END AS Status FROM expected_sources e LEFT JOIN attempts a ON a.account_id=e.account_id AND a.source=e.source AND a.r=1 LEFT JOIN successes s ON s.account_id=e.account_id AND s.source=e.source AND s.r=1 ORDER BY Status DESC,e.source,e.account_id
